# linus-review.md

Process feedback from Linus's weekly sweeps of the in-scope thomashaus portfolio.

Zeus reads this to update `project-template` between cycles. Each section is
dated and append-only — earlier sections are historical record, the latest
section is what to act on now.

**Generated by:** `tools/linus.py --weekly` on Tom's home machine.
**Authority:** standing exception per Charlie's `docs/SOUL.md` hard rule #5.

---
